scripts.dev: concurrently "cd Backend && php artisan serve" "cd Backend && npm run dev" "cd Backend && npx laravel-echo-server start" "cd Data-Miners && npm run dev" --names "LARAVEL,VITE,WEBSOCKET,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "red,blue,yellow,green"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd Backend && npm run build" "cd Data-Miners && npm run build"
